evidence_quotes.quote: Please look into the destruction of purchased digital goods, like for example video games, from customers.
Hundreds of games have already been made unplayable or straight up removed from the libraries of customers without any financial reimbursement.
If a publisher or studio wants to stop selling or supporting a product, that doesn't give them the right to basically come to my house and destroy the copy that I bought.

paragraphs.text: Please look into the destruction of purchased digital goods, like for example video games, from customers. Hundreds of games have already been made unplayable or straight up removed from the libraries of customers without any financial reimbursement. If a publisher or studio wants to stop selling or supporting a product, that doesn't give them the right to basically come to my house and destroy the copy that I bought. Digital goods should have the same kind of protection as physical goods. Wether digital or physical, my property is my property.
